records.ety: [L. raritas: cf. F. raret. See Rare.]

defs: The quality or state of being rare; rareness; thinness; as, the rarity (contrasted with the density) of gases.
That which is rare; an uncommon thing; a thing valued for its scarcity.
quotes: I saw three rarities of different kinds, which pleased me more than any other shows in the place.
